title: uku's pvp modpack
body:
![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/JR0bkFKa/images/6d2d9092df722b996fb8197bbe4993556796c82e.png) Very simple modpack aimed towards PvP, with many performance mods to give you a lag-free experience, and multiple pvp-focused mods.

Windows Installer • Universal Installer

## Credits * **Artwork by [Pilloq](https://twitter.com/pilloq2)** * [Installer](https://github.com/skywardmc/additive-installer) by Gaming32, with minor edits by uku * Saturation pack by uku, using assets given by WinterStars * [Xaero's Minimap (Fair Play Edition)](https://chocolateminecraft.com/minimap2.php#)
